productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Black Striped Trousers
description: Composition Charcoal striped trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two side pockets, two back pockets with looped button closures, comfortable waist with belt loops and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not bleach or wring by hand Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Take formal dressing to the next level with this pair of trousers from mark taylor. The fall of the fabric gives a slim shape while offering all day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cuff-links and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M in pants on a model of Height-6', Waist-32" and Hips-38”
